content:
Any admin should have acted on https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31431 by now.
Just in case you haven't, here's a nice writeup what to do: https://github.com/devstuff/harden-docker-seccomp

Ubuntu still hasn't released new kernels... I applied the fix with blacklisting the kernel module on our hypervisor machines last week, which seems to work reliably.
Here we go again. If your installation uses CIFS in some way, make sure to install patches. https://heyitsas.im/posts/cifswitch/
